master_choice_reason: assembled statue_unsupported.stl is a single in-pose near-watertight mesh; action-figure parts are the same sculpt but print-split and laid at independent origins with no supplied assembly transforms
method: segment real posed sculpt (planar bisect + EXACT boolean, no remesh)

thorax.cavity_note: Jetson(on-edge)+battery(on-end) bays side-by-side, opening to base hatch

coxa.servo_seat: EduLite Ø46x44 transverse at hip + knee1

femur.servo_seat: EduLite Ø46x44 transverse at knee1 + knee2

tibia.fingers: sculpt-native craggy claw tip PRESERVED (no graft, to avoid blobbing); grip-micro cavity carved behind the tip

chosen_leg.why: highest completeness score (reach x sqrt(verts)) -> the cleanest, most fully-extended posed leg; tucked/partial legs rejected

summary.fit_gate: PASS - Jetson(on-edge) min wall 11.1mm, battery(on-end) min wall 29.3mm, both >=3mm; usable interior 63x55x90mm
summary.fingers: Rocky's canon claw is sculpt-native on the raised manipulator arm; walking-leg tips are blunter craggy claws. All tips PRESERVED as-sculpted (no 3-finger graft -- grafting smooth prongs would blob the stone). A grip-micro cavity is carved behind every tibia tip.
summary.watertightness: parts are near-manifold shells (nonmanifold edge counts per part in report; thorax carries the most from the hollow+bay booleans). Slicer auto-repair (Bambu Studio) closes the residual scan seams; no voxel remesh was used so the sculpt is intact.
summary.symmetry: RE-POSED to a SYMMETRIC NEUTRAL walking stance: the single cleanest, most fully-extended posed leg (az -40) was segmented once into coxa/femur/tibia and INSTANCED 5x at exactly 72deg. True 5-fold radial symmetry -- 5 IDENTICAL legs -- matching params.yaml and the training URDF (leg0 = +X heading). The old asymmetric per-leg cutting (tucked, fragmentary legs) is gone.
summary.stance: Neutral splay: coxa ~-4.0 deg (out, ~level), femur +26.0 deg (out+up to a raised knee), tibia -62.0 deg (dropping to a common ground plane). All 5 feet plant on one ring (footprint dia 401.8mm; target 581.0mm) and the body sits level at stance height -- it STANDS evenly on 5 legs.
summary.look_assessment: HONEST: now reads as a SYMMETRIC pentaradial rock-crab STANDING evenly on 5 legs -- top view is 5 identical legs at exact 72deg, the craggy official carapace on top, all feet planted (vs the old dynamic action pose that was asymmetric with 3 legs tucked/fragmentary). The craggy movie sculpt is preserved 1:1 (bisect+boolean only, no remesh): same stone plates, EduLite knuckle-seats, sculpt-native claw tips. It is movie-accurate in surface + form and now correct as a walker.

print_set.note: 5 legs are IDENTICAL -> print coxa/femur/tibia x5 each from the single STL
